description: Add volume confirmation filter to entry — require current bar volume > 1.2x its 20-bar SMA to confirm breakout is backed by real participation, not just thin-air spike.
Increase volatility scaling floor from 0.20→0.40 to allow larger positions during high-vol regimes where the biggest trends occur, while keeping drawdown well below the 30% gate.
Shorten breakout entry period from 24→20 bars to widen the candidate set and capture momentum earlier in strong trends.
Add 200-bar SMA regime filter: only enter when close > SMA200 to avoid counter-trend trades in bear regimes, replacing the DI alignment condition that is redundant with the ADX momentum filter.
Replace ATR-trailing-stop with a simpler percent-based trailing stop (7%) to create a consistent risk-reward profile without ATR-dependent exit logic — the current dual ATR exit (trailing stop + time
